title: Epic: Chat methods (set, typing, queryChanges)
description:
Why: Current codebase has Chat/get, Chat/query, Chat/changes but lacks Chat/set (create/update chats), Chat/typing (new formal JMAP method), and Chat/queryChanges. These are required for a writable chat experience.

What:
- Chat/set: create direct/group/channel chats, update metadata, pin messages, receiveTypingIndicators, receiptSharing, slowModeSeconds
- Chat/typing: send typing indicator (debounce ~1s, respect 3s server rate limit)
- Chat/queryChanges
- Handle rateLimited SetError from slow mode enforcement
- Fixture tests for all methods

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq), methods refactor epic
close_reason: All 5 methods implemented (chat_create_direct, chat_create_group, chat_set_update, chat_typing, chat_query_changes), 42 tests passing, review converged in 1 round
